target.name: heart_disease
notes: Original BRFSS target _MICHD was remapped as 1 -> 1 and 2 -> 0.
The saved model expects the final processed and engineered feature set listed below.
The original notebook trained after undersampling the training data only.
The packaged final artifact was fit on a balanced downsample of the full processed dataset to preserve that training behavior.

input_normalization_notes: Missing survey codes 7, 9, 77, 99, 777, 999 were treated as missing and rows with missing values were dropped during training.
bmi was divided by 100 from the original BRFSS _BMI5 field.
Columns removed before modeling: education_level, employment, race, income_level, asthma_now, bp_meds, chol_check, heart_attack, coronary_hd.

feature_formulas.chronic_count: sum(high_bp, diabetes, arthritis, stroke, copd, kidney_disease, high_chol)
feature_formulas.burden_index: sum(high_bp, high_chol, diabetes, stroke, copd, arthritis, kidney_disease, depression, asthma_ever) / 9
